_publications._publicationTitle: Suggested response criteria for phase II antitumor drug studies for neurofibromatosis type 2 related vestibular schwannoma.

_contextSnippet: radiographic tumor response (defined as a 20% reduction in tumor volume)
resourceName: Vitrea2 (Vital Images, Minnetonka, MN) semi-automated segmentation software
details: Used for volumetric tumor response assessment with radiographic tumor response defined as 20% reduction in tumor volume, serving as the major endpoint for phase II trial design
